x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI entity resolution matches incident descriptions and alert sources to specific CIs by name. CIs with copy/test/temp naming patterns cause false matches and lead Now Assist to associate incidents with wrong CIs.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Identify and rename CIs with copy/test/temp naming patterns via cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=nameLIKEcopy^ORnameLIKEtest^ORnameLIKEtemp. Establish and enforce a CI naming standard. Consider retiring test/copy CIs no longer needed. Inconsistent naming causes Now Assist entity resolution false matches.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_b6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c16
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[AI entity resolution matches incident descriptions and alert sources to specific CIs by name. CIs with copy/test/temp naming patterns cause false matches and lead Now Assist to associate incidents with wrong CIs.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CI Name Consistency</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use separate queries to avoid OR precedence issues with multiple LIKE clauses
    var suspects = {};

    function collectSuspect(pattern) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('cmdb_ci');
        gr.addQuery('install_status', 1);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', pattern);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            suspects[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectSuspect('copy');
    collectSuspect('test');
    collectSuspect('temp');
    collectSuspect('COPY');
    collectSuspect('TEST');
    collectSuspect('TEMP');

    var suspect = Object.keys(suspects).length;

    var actualValue = suspect + ' CIs with suspect naming patterns (copy/test/temp)';

    if (suspect === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CIs with suspect naming patterns detected. Now Assist entity resolution will not encounter false matches from test or copy records.' };
    } else if (suspect < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: suspect + ' CIs have suspect naming patterns (copy/test/temp). These may cause Now Assist entity resolution false matches — review and rename or retire these CIs.' };
    } else if (suspect < 500) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: suspect + ' CIs have suspect naming patterns. Significant naming inconsistency — Now Assist entity resolution accuracy is at risk. Establish and enforce a CI naming standard.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: suspect + ' CIs have suspect naming patterns. Critical naming hygiene issue — Now Assist entity resolution will produce frequent false matches across ' + suspect + ' poorly named records.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000375</number><order>30</order><remediation_guidance>Identify and rename CIs with copy/test/temp naming patterns via cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=nameLIKEcopy^ORnameLIKEtest^ORnameLIKEtemp. Establish and enforce a CI naming standard. Consider retiring test/copy CIs no longer needed. Inconsistent naming causes Now Assist entity resolution false matches.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>b6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c16</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CI Name Consistency</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_b6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c16</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
